holdings.infoBox: ICOP is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 8.95%, Anglo American at 8.93%, Freeport-McMoRan at 8.20%, GRUPO MEXICO B at 7.85%, and TECK RESOURCES SUBORDINATE VOTING at 6.00%.

overview.description: The iShares Copper and Metals Mining ETF (ICOP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks a market-capitalization weighted index composed of stocks of copper and metal ore mining companies globally. Stocks are quantitatively screened to identify stocks with significant revenue tied to this space ICOP was launched on Jun 21, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: STOXX Global Copper and Metals Mining Index
